pain_observed: checker scripts mutated historical report files
root_cause_summary: Runner lacked argparse/read-only gate and checkers wrote to historical report paths by default.
new_rule: Historical reports must not be overwritten by default.
Write-capable scripts must declare explicit output paths or explicit write mode.
Read-only smoke gates compare git status before and after.
future_reuse: Apply this contract to future Mechanicus runners/checkers.
Require same read-only discipline before Officio Agentis body task runners are admitted.
Track this as checker policy baseline in future Administratum registration cards.
